test-method.name: verifyNewNewsCreation
test-method.description: “Verify that a new news item can be created successfully

test-method.name: verifyEditContact
test-method.description: Verify that contact information can be edited successfully

test-method.name: verifyEditFooterText
test-method.description: Verify that the footer text can be edited successfully

test-method.name: verifyNewAdminUserCreation
test-method.description: Verify that a new user can be created successfully

test-method.name: verifyInvalidUsernameAndInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with invalid username and invalid password

test-method.name: verifyInvalidUsernameAndValidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with invalid username and valid password

test-method.name: verifyValidUsernameAndInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with valid username and invalid password

test-method.name: verifyValidUsernameAndValidPassword
test-method.description: Verify that a user can successfully log in with a valid username and valid password

test-method.name: verifySuccessfulLogout
test-method.description: Verify that a logged-in user can log out successfully

test-method.name: verifyNewCategoryCreation
test-method.description: Verify that a new category/product can be added successfully with its image

test-method.name: verifyNewNewsCreation
test-method.description: “Verify that a new news item can be created successfully

test-method.name: verifyEditContact
test-method.description: Verify that contact information can be edited successfully

test-method.name: verifyEditFooterText
test-method.description: Verify that the footer text can be edited successfully

test-method.name: verifyNewAdminUserCreation
test-method.description: Verify that a new user can be created successfully

test-method.name: verifyInvalidUsernameAndInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with invalid username and invalid password

test-method.name: verifyInvalidUsernameAndValidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with invalid username and valid password

test-method.name: verifyValidUsernameAndInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Check whether the system prevents login with valid username and invalid password

test-method.name: verifyValidUsernameAndValidPassword
test-method.description: Verify that a user can successfully log in with a valid username and valid password

test-method.name: verifySuccessfulLogout
test-method.description: Verify that a logged-in user can log out successfully

test-method.name: verifyNewCategoryCreation
test-method.description: Verify that a new category/product can be added successfully with its image
